overall_assessment: A highly effective and neutral breakdown of communication and media framing. The analysis successfully pairs the Iran trade collapse with the UAE CEPA growth to preemptively dismantle any 3R-Religion misreadings. The paradox framing is grounded in mathematical proportionality rather than partisan accusation.
